caption: The video features a man standing at a podium, delivering a speech. He is dressed in traditional attire, wearing a white kurta and a beige vest. The background consists of a textured wall with a geometric pattern, and there is a decorative column to his right adorned with red flowers. As he speaks, he uses expressive hand gestures, pointing upwards with both hands to emphasize his points. His demeanor suggests that he is addressing an important topic, likely in a formal or official setting. The presence of microphones on the podium indicates that his speech is being amplified for an audience.
